raw:
Now let me verify the anchors against actual code.
All anchors verify correctly:
- `shouldReusePersistedDraft()` at planner.ts:72 returns `draft?.source === "planner"` ✓
- Used at index.ts:1687 in the `shouldReusePersistedDraft(persisted) ? persisted : await draftPlannerPlan(...)` line ✓
- install.sh crew-linking loop at install.sh:48 symlinks per-file into `~/.pi/agent/agents/` ✓

Both documentation requirements are met:
1. Planner draft reuse rule documented in the Gate-1 flow section with correct function/file anchors, explaining fallback drafts don't permanently stick.
2. Add-a-crew-role install step added to both the extension-recipes section and as a NEVER-do gotcha.

The change is docs-only (only INTERNALS.md modified; CHARTER untouched, which is fine). No code/tests/AGENTS.md touched. The author moved brittle line anchors to function-name anchors as requested. All headless tests pass.

VERDICT: PASS
